description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named OctoBot-Tentacles-CI that runs on push to any branch or tag and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: tests, upload_tentacles, and notify. The tests job runs on a matrix of macos-latest, windows-latest, and ubuntu-latest with Python 3.8, installs OctoBot, and runs tests. The upload_tentacles job uploads tentacles to Nexus and requires the tests job to succeed. The notify job sends a failure notification to Discord if any of the previous jobs fail.
